justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction between AC1 (24h) and AC2 (1h) explicitly identified; formal escalation with clear description of the conflict; no implementation code produced; escalation question is specific ('What is the authoritative expiry window — 24 hours or 1 hour?'); Shaq stopped and waited for Bird clarification.

observations.text: Contradiction detected pre-implementation with zero code produced
Escalation clearly describes mutual exclusivity of the two expiry windows
Correctly routed to Bird for domain clarification
Question is precise and actionable — asks Bird to remove or rewrite the incorrect criterion
Confidence level of 10 appropriately reflects inability to proceed without clarification
